title: Ethiopian Lentil Stew
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish made with red lentils in a flavorful stew. Serve with injera bread for a complete meal.
instructions: Heat the niter kibbeh in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the tomato and cook until it starts to break down, about 5 minutes.
Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red lentils and water to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Serve hot over injera bread, if desired.
